author: DominicVainMod
content:
DO NOT ANSWER ANY DMS REGARDING THESE REWARDS  

The wallet that was used during the Surge test is the wallet that is able to claim the rewards on https://play.staratlas.com/.

If you created a wallet in-game, you can export the key here (pictured below)
